tests.scenario: Verify immediate language change without restart
tests.expected_result: Navigation labels update to Spanish immediately.
tests.notes: Navigating in 2 mins is too subjective for a test. I changed it to verify the UI language updates immediately.

tests.scenario: Verify language persistence after app restart
tests.expected_result: The application remains in Spanish.
tests.notes: Added a test to ensure localization settings save permanently to device storage.

tests.expected_result: A PDF file containing a mood graph is opened.
tests.notes: Deleted the AI's test about reducing symptoms since that's a medical outcome, not a software test. Testing the PDF export instead.

tests.scenario: Handling export with zero data entries
steps: Login with a new empty account
tests.expected_result: An error message 'Not enough data to export' is displayed.
tests.notes: Added a negative test case for robust data handling.

tests.expected_result: No data packets are sent to third-party tracking domains.
tests.notes: Rewrote this as a proper technical test to verify network requests are actually blocked when the user opts out.

tests.expected_result: Analytics packets are sent to authorized domains.
tests.notes: Added to verify the toggle works in both directions.

tests.scenario: Access 14-day basic trend on free tier
steps: Log in as a free user with 14 days of data
tests.expected_result: The basic line chart is fully visible and not blocked by a paywall.
tests.notes: Added a test to explicitly check that free users can actually see their 14-day chart without hitting a paywall.

tests.expected_result: A subscription screen is presented correctly.
tests.notes: Verifies that the paywall only exists for premium features, not basic charts.

tests.scenario: Crisis modal trigger on severe inputs
tests.expected_result: A modal displaying emergency hotline numbers appears.
tests.notes: You can't write a test for 'self-awareness'. I replaced it with a test that checks if the crisis modal triggers correctly.

steps: Tap the phone icon for the hotline
tests.expected_result: The device phone dialer opens with the correct number pre-filled.
tests.notes: Added to ensure the safety resources are actually accessible.

tests.scenario: Save custom text note to log
steps: Type 'Rough meeting' into the notes field
tests.expected_result: 'Rough meeting' is displayed under the daily log entry.
tests.notes: Scrapped the AI's community test since the feature doesn't exist. Now it tests the custom note-saving functionality.

steps: Type 600 characters into the note field
tests.expected_result: The app truncates the note at 500 characters or displays a limit warning.
tests.notes: Added to test input constraints.

steps: Log in as a free user
tests.expected_result: A padlock icon is visible on all premium-tier features.
tests.notes: Replaced the 'value for money' survey test with a straightforward UI check for the premium padlocks.

steps: Log in as a Premium user
tests.expected_result: No padlock icons are visible on any features.
tests.notes: Verifies UI state changes correctly based on account status.

steps: Navigate through the app for 5 minutes
tests.expected_result: The promotional modal does not reappear during the session.
tests.notes: Changed this to test the cooldown timer on the therapy ads, since 'helpful insights' isn't a testable action.

tests.expected_result: The therapy information screen opens correctly.
tests.notes: Ensures features are still findable when not being pushed as ads.

tests.scenario: Tooltip modal trigger for clinical terms
tests.expected_result: A popup modal displays a plain-language definition.
tests.notes: Updated the steps to test the new tooltip feature instead of the AI's fake coaching feature.

tests.expected_result: The modal closes and returns the user to the assessment.
tests.notes: Verifies basic modal UI interaction.

tests.expected_result: The entry is saved and the user is returned to the dashboard.
tests.notes: A test for 'user confidence' makes no sense. I changed it to count the exact number of taps needed to log a mood.

tests.expected_result: The entry is saved correctly.
tests.notes: Verifies that the tap constraint only applies to the mandatory path.
